$readme: Context for translators. Keys mirror en.json (flat dot-paths). This file is NOT loaded at runtime and is excluded from check-locales. Placeholders like {{name}} must be kept verbatim. The popup is 360-400px wide: keep buttons/labels short.
common.back: Button, secondary. Goes one step back. Keep very short.
common.next: Button, primary. Advances a multi-step flow. Keep very short.
common.cancel: Button, cancels the current flow. Keep very short.
common.save: Button, saves the wallet name edit. Keep very short.
common.retry: Small text-button under error banners, re-runs the failed request.
common.loading: aria-label of the loading spinner (screen readers only).
common.networks: Section heading (small caps) for the blockchain networks list; also the back-button label on the Receive detail screen.
common.stepHeader: Step indicator above titles in multi-step flows, e.g. 'Step 1 of 2 · Protection'. {{step}}/{{total}} are numbers, {{section}} is a translated section name.
common.passwordLabel: Form field label above the password input.
common.passwordRepeatLabel: Form field label for the confirmation password input.
common.passwordPlaceholder: Placeholder inside password inputs; states the 8-character minimum.
common.seedPlaceholder: Placeholder in the seed-phrase textarea; three lowercase example words and an ellipsis.
nav.label: aria-label of the bottom navigation bar (screen readers only).
nav.home: Bottom nav tab label. Max ~10 chars, one word.
nav.activity: Bottom nav tab label (transaction history). Max ~10 chars.
nav.receive: Bottom nav tab label (receive funds). Max ~10 chars.
nav.chat: Bottom nav tab label (AI chat). Max ~10 chars.
nav.more: Bottom nav tab label for the settings screen. Max ~8 chars.
onboarding.tagline: Small-caps tagline under the logo on the welcome screen.
onboarding.intro: One-sentence product description under the tagline, max ~3 lines.
onboarding.createNew: Primary button on the welcome screen.
onboarding.importExisting: Secondary button on the welcome screen ('an existing one' = an existing wallet).
onboarding.keysNote: Small reassurance footnote at the bottom of the welcome screen.
onboarding.add.eyebrow: Small-caps breadcrumb above the 'Add a wallet' title ('Wallets · Adding').
onboarding.add.title: Screen title when adding an extra wallet from Settings.
onboarding.add.description: Paragraph explaining that the new wallet is independent from existing ones.
onboarding.add.importSeed: Secondary button; imports via seed phrase.
onboarding.create.section: Section name shown in the step header of the password step.
onboarding.create.title: Title of the password step when creating the first wallet.
onboarding.create.passwordHint: Paragraph under the title; technical crypto names (Argon2id, AES-256-GCM) stay untranslated.
onboarding.create.passwordHintAdd: Variant of the paragraph when adding an extra wallet.
onboarding.create.backupSection: Section name in the step header of the backup step.
onboarding.create.backupTitle: Title of the seed-phrase backup step.
onboarding.create.backupHint: Paragraph telling the user to write down the 12 words offline.
onboarding.create.recoveryDoc: Small-caps caption on the card that displays the seed phrase like a document.
onboarding.create.wordCount_one: Word counter chip on the seed card, plural forms ({{count}} = 12 or 24). Add the plural forms your language needs (_one/_few/_many/_other).
onboarding.create.neverShare: Warning footnote on the seed card.
onboarding.create.savedConfirm: Checkbox label the user must tick before finishing; confirms the phrase is saved.
onboarding.create.creating: Primary button label while the wallet is being created (with ellipsis).
onboarding.create.finish: Primary button that completes wallet creation.
onboarding.import.section: Section name in the step header of the import screen.
onboarding.import.title: Title of the import screen.
onboarding.import.sourceAria: aria-label of the seed/private-key toggle (screen readers only).
onboarding.import.seedTab: Toggle tab label: import from seed phrase.
onboarding.import.keyTab: Toggle tab label: import from a private key.
onboarding.import.seedLabel: Textarea label for the seed phrase.
onboarding.import.keyLabel: Textarea label for the private key.
onboarding.import.importing: Primary button label while importing (with ellipsis).
onboarding.import.submit: Primary button that starts the import.
unlock.title: Big serif greeting on the unlock screen.
unlock.pickerAria: aria-label of the wallet picker button on the unlock screen.
unlock.passwordFor: Password field label including the wallet name, e.g. 'Password — Main'. {{name}} is the wallet name.
unlock.passwordPlaceholder: Placeholder of the unlock password input.
unlock.unlocking: Submit button label while unlocking (with ellipsis).
unlock.submit: Primary submit button of the unlock form.
unlock.forgot: Small underlined text-link that starts password recovery.
unlock.note: Small footnote at the bottom of the unlock screen.
restore.section: Section name in the step headers of the 3-step recovery flow.
restore.explainTitle: Title of recovery step 1 (mirrors the 'Forgot password?' link).
restore.explainText: Paragraph on step 1 explaining that only the seed phrase can restore access.
restore.noPhraseWarning: Red warning card on step 1: no phrase = funds lost.
restore.createNewHint: Text inside a neutral card on the first 'Forgot password?' step, above a 'Create a new wallet' button (label reuses onboarding.createNew). Escape hatch for users without the seed phrase: they can start a fresh wallet; the locked one stays in the list.
restore.havePhrase: Primary button on step 1 leading to phrase entry.
restore.phraseHint: Paragraph on step 2 when the wallet has no display name.
restore.phraseHintNamed: Paragraph on step 2 including the wallet name. {{name}} is the wallet name; keep the quotes style of your language.
restore.mismatch: Warning card when the entered phrase derives different addresses (unnamed variant).
restore.mismatchNamed: Same warning including the wallet name {{name}}.
restore.restoreAsNew: Secondary button inside the mismatch card: add the phrase as a separate new wallet.
restore.verifying: Primary button label while the phrase is being verified (with ellipsis).
restore.newPassword: Title of step 3 AND label of the new-password field.
restore.newPasswordHint: Paragraph on step 3 in the normal flow (password replaced in the same wallet).
restore.asNewHint: Paragraph on step 3 when restoring as a new wallet.
restore.finishAsNew: Primary button on step 3 in the 'as new wallet' mode.
restore.finishReplace: Primary button on step 3 in the normal mode.
restore.restoring: Primary button label while restoring (with ellipsis).
home.walletFallback: Fallback account name in the Home header when the account has no name.
home.receiveAddresses: Tooltip/aria-label of the QR icon-button in the Home header.
home.lockWallet: Tooltip/aria-label of the lock icon-button in the Home header; also the red lock row in Settings.
home.totalBalance: Small-caps caption under the big USD balance; also the aria-label of that section.
home.backendDownBalances: Error banner when the backend is unreachable on Home.
home.send: Quick-action button (brass, primary) on Home. Keep short.
home.receive: Quick-action button (outlined) on Home. Keep short.
home.assets: Small-caps section heading above the token list.
home.noAssetsTitle: Empty-state title when the wallet has no tokens.
home.noAssetsHint: Empty-state hint; 'Receive' refers to the nav.receive tab name.
home.tokenSuffix: Suffix after the chain name for non-native assets, rendered as 'Ethereum · token'. Lowercase, one word.
send.eyebrow: Small-caps caption above the Send screen title.
send.title: Send screen title.
send.asset: Select label: which asset to send.
send.nativeCoin: Select option for the chain's native coin. {{symbol}} is a ticker like ETH.
send.erc20Option: Select option for an ERC-20 token. {{symbol}} is a ticker like USDC.
send.recipient: Input label for the recipient address.
send.solanaPlaceholder: Placeholder of the recipient input when Solana is selected ('Base58' is a format name).
send.amount: Input label for the amount. {{symbol}} is the asset ticker.
send.sent: Success card title after the transaction is broadcast.
send.feeNote: Footnote above the submit button; 'standard' is the technical fee-tier id, keep it quoted.
send.signing: Submit button label while signing (with ellipsis).
send.submit: Submit button of the send form.
receive.eyebrow: Small-caps caption above the Receive screen title.
receive.title: Receive screen title.
receive.noAccountTitle: Empty-state title when the account is locked.
receive.noAccountHint: Empty-state hint when the account is locked.
receive.chooseNetwork: Paragraph under the title on the network list.
receive.evmShared: Footnote under the network list. {{chains}} is a comma-separated list of network names.
receive.addressEyebrow: Small-caps caption above the address card title.
receive.qrAria: aria-label of the QR canvas (screen readers only).
receive.copyAddress: Button under the QR code that copies the address.
receive.copied: Button label for ~2s after a successful copy.
receive.clipboardError: Error line when the clipboard API is unavailable.
receive.networkWarning: Amber warning card: send only assets of this network. {{chain}} is the network name.
receive.evmSharedDetail: Second line of the warning for EVM chains. {{chains}} is a list of network names.
receive.topUpMethods: Small-caps section heading for the top-up options card.
receive.fromWallet: Top-up option title: transfer from another wallet.
receive.fromExchange: Top-up option title: withdraw from an exchange.
receive.fromExchangeHint: Hint under 'From an exchange'. {{chain}} is the network name.
receive.buyWithCard: Top-up option title: buy crypto with a bank card.
receive.externalService: Small-caps chip next to 'Buy with a card' marking third-party providers.
receive.providerHint: Hint above the provider buttons (MoonPay etc. are brand names, never translated).
activity.eyebrow: Small-caps caption above the Activity screen title.
activity.title: Activity screen title.
activity.viewAria: aria-label of the History | Analytics segmented control (tablist) on the Activity screen.
activity.viewHistory: Segment button: switches to the transaction history list. Keep short.
activity.viewAnalytics: Segment button: switches to the fee/summary charts. Keep short.
activity.backendDown: Error banner when history could not be loaded.
activity.emptyTitle: Empty-state title when there are no transactions.
activity.statusFailed: Inline status tag after the timestamp for failed transactions. Lowercase.
activity.statusPending: Inline status tag for pending transactions. Lowercase.
txDetail.title: sr-only heading of the transaction detail screen (screen readers only). Opened by tapping a row in Activity → History.
txDetail.description: Small-caps label above the human/AI transaction explanation block. The explanation text itself comes from the backend and is already localised.
txDetail.network: Row label (small caps): the blockchain network of the transaction.
txDetail.direction: Row label (small caps): the direction of funds (see dirIn/dirOut/dirSelf).
txDetail.dirIn: Direction value: funds received into the wallet.
txDetail.dirOut: Direction value: funds sent out of the wallet.
txDetail.dirSelf: Direction value: a self-transfer / internal move (no net in or out).
txDetail.dateTime: Row label (small caps): the absolute, localised date and time of the transaction.
txDetail.hash: Small-caps label above the transaction hash (a long hex/base58 id shown in monospace, left-to-right).
txDetail.copy: Tiny text-button next to the hash that copies it to the clipboard. Keep short.
txDetail.copied: Replaces 'Copy' for ~2s after a successful copy. Keep short.
txDetail.viewExplorer: Button label that opens the transaction on the network's block explorer (Etherscan, Solscan, etc.) in a new browser tab.
txDetail.externalService: Grey hint under the 'View in explorer' button noting the explorer is a third-party site opening in a new tab. The 'External service' chip reuses receive.externalService.
txDetail.statusConfirmed: Status capsule label (teal) for a confirmed/successful transaction.
txDetail.statusPending: Status capsule label (amber) for a pending transaction.
txDetail.statusFailed: Status capsule label (red) for a failed transaction.
analytics.periodAria: aria-label of the period filter (radiogroup of four segments) at the top of the Analytics view.
analytics.period7d: Period filter segment: last 7 days. Very short — four segments share one row in the narrow popup.
analytics.period30d: Period filter segment: last 30 days. Very short.
analytics.period90d: Period filter segment: last 90 days. Very short.
analytics.period1y: Period filter segment: last year. Very short.
analytics.backendDown: Error note when the analytics API is unreachable. Mirrors activity.backendDown.
analytics.emptyTitle: Empty-state title when there is no fee/transaction data for the selected period.
analytics.feesTitle: Stat tile caption under a hero USD amount: total network fees paid in the period. Small-caps, keep short.
analytics.txCountTitle: Stat tile caption under a hero number: transaction count in the period. Keep short.
analytics.feesOverTime: Section eyebrow above the fee timeline bar chart.
analytics.byChain: Section eyebrow above the horizontal bars of fees per network.
analytics.byCategory: Section eyebrow above the horizontal bars of volume per transaction category.
analytics.feesChartAria: aria-label of the fee timeline SVG bar chart.
analytics.txShort: Compact transaction count used in bar tooltips, e.g. 'Ethereum: $12.30 · 5 tx'. {{n}} is the number. Keep it very short.
category.transfer: Transaction category chip (small caps). Keep to 1 short word.
category.approve: Transaction category chip: token spending approval.
category.mint: Transaction category chip: NFT/token mint. 'Mint' is common crypto jargon.
category.dapp: Transaction category chip: generic dApp interaction. 'dApp' stays as is.
chat.eyebrow: Small-caps caption above the chat title.
chat.title: Chat screen title.
chat.disclaimer: Small note under the title: the assistant cannot sign transactions.
chat.tryAsking: Small-caps caption above the suggested questions (empty chat).
chat.suggestion2: Suggested question button 2 (active token approvals; 'approve' is crypto jargon).
chat.thinking: Pulsing placeholder inside the assistant bubble while streaming starts. Lowercase, with ellipsis.
chat.streamInterrupted: Assistant bubble text when the stream broke before any answer.
chat.sendAria: aria-label of the round send button (screen readers only).
approve.eyebrow: Small-caps caption above the signature-request title.
approve.method.eth_requestAccounts: Title of the approval window for a connection request.
approve.method.eth_accounts: Title for an address list request.
approve.method.eth_chainId: Title for a network id request.
approve.method.eth_sendTransaction: Title for a transaction signature request.
approve.method.personal_sign: Title for a message signature request.
approve.fromLabel: Label before the requesting site origin, rendered as 'From app.uniswap.org'.
approve.whatHappens: Small-caps heading of the AI explanation card.
approve.techDetails: Collapsible summary line that reveals the raw JSON request.
approve.confirmPhrase: THE EXACT PHRASE the user must type to confirm a high-risk signature. Short (2-4 words), easy to type, no quotes inside.
approve.confirmPrompt: Instruction above the confirmation input. {{phrase}} is approve.confirmPhrase.
approve.confirmAria: aria-label of the confirmation input. {{phrase}} is approve.confirmPhrase.
risk.low: Green risk badge on the approval card. 2 words max.
settings.eyebrow: Small-caps caption above the settings title.
settings.title: Settings screen title; matches the nav.more tab.
settings.wallets: Small-caps section heading of the wallet list.
settings.walletActive: Tiny chip next to the active wallet's name. Max ~10 chars.
settings.addWallet: Row-button at the end of the wallet list.
settings.walletName: Input label when renaming a wallet.
settings.switch: Small button: make this wallet active.
settings.rename: Small button: start renaming this wallet.
settings.remove: Small button (red): start deleting this wallet.
settings.removeWarning: Red warning paragraph in the delete confirmation.
settings.removeWarningLast: Extra sentence appended when deleting the last wallet.
settings.savedSeedConfirm: Checkbox label required before deletion is allowed.
settings.removing: Red button label while deleting (with ellipsis).
settings.removeNamed: Red confirmation button with the wallet name, e.g. 'Delete "Main"'. {{name}} is the wallet name.
settings.account: Small-caps section heading of the account card.
settings.accountMeta: Grey line under the account name. {{index}} is the HD derivation index (a number).
settings.actions: Small-caps section heading of the quick actions card.
settings.sendAction: Action row title (opens the Send screen).
settings.sendActionHint: Grey hint under 'Send funds'. EVM is a technical term.
settings.addressesAction: Action row title (opens the Receive screen).
settings.addressesActionHint: Grey hint under 'Addresses and QR codes'.
settings.language: Small-caps section heading of the language block.
settings.languageLabel: Select label above the language dropdown. Option names are native language names and are NOT translated.
settings.languageHint: Grey hint under the language dropdown.
settings.security: Small-caps section heading of the security card.
settings.securityNote: Paragraph in the security card; keep crypto names untranslated.
settings.revealSeed: Row button in Settings → Security. Opens the reveal-seed-phrase flow. Keep short.
settings.revealSeedHint: Small grey hint under settings.revealSeed: the wallet password must be re-entered.
settings.revealSeedWarning: Red warning card shown before the phrase is revealed. Strong, unambiguous danger wording.
settings.revealSeedChecking: Button label while the password is being verified (Argon2id, ~1s).
settings.revealSeedShow: Primary button that confirms and reveals the phrase. Keep short.
settings.revealSeedHide: Secondary button that hides the phrase again and clears it from memory. Keep short.
settings.lock: Red row-button that locks the wallet.
settings.footer: Grey footer line. {{version}} like '0.1.0', {{networks}} is a number.
wallets.defaultName: Default wallet name assigned on creation, e.g. 'Wallet 2'. {{number}} is a counter.
wallets.defaultAccountName: Default account name, e.g. 'Account 1'. {{number}} is a counter.
wallets.newWalletPassword: Step title AND field label used when a NEW wallet gets its own password (add-wallet and restore-as-new flows).
time.justNow: Relative timestamp for events less than a minute old. Lowercase.
errorBoundary.title: Title of the crash screen.
errorBoundary.body: Reassurance paragraph on the crash screen: keys are safe.
errorBoundary.reload: Button that reloads the popup after a crash.
errors.passwordTooShort: Form error: password shorter than 8 characters.
errors.passwordsMismatch: Form error: the two password fields differ.
errors.createWalletFailed: Generic fallback error when wallet creation fails.
errors.importFailed: Generic fallback error when import fails.
errors.privateKeyImportSoon: Shown when the user tries private-key import (not implemented yet).
errors.phraseWordCount: Form error: the phrase is not 12 or 24 words.
errors.invalidMnemonic: Form error: BIP-39 validation failed. BIP-39/checksum are technical terms.
errors.phraseOtherWallet: Recovery error: the phrase is valid but belongs to another wallet.
errors.restoreFailed: Generic fallback error when recovery fails.
errors.unlockFailed: Generic fallback error when unlock fails.
errors.vaultEmpty: Error when the vault unexpectedly contains no accounts.
errors.backgroundUnresponsive: Error when the extension's background script does not answer.
errors.switchWalletFailed: Generic fallback error when switching wallets fails.
errors.renameWalletFailed: Generic fallback error when renaming fails.
errors.removeWalletFailed: Generic fallback error when deletion fails.
errors.walletNotFound: Storage error: no wallet with the given id.
errors.walletNotCreated: Error when an operation needs a wallet but none exists.
errors.walletNameEmpty: Form error: empty wallet name on rename.
errors.walletLocked: Error when signing is attempted while the wallet is locked.
errors.bitcoinSignSoon: Error: Bitcoin message signing not implemented yet. PSBT/BDK are technical terms.
errors.bitcoinTxSoon: Error: Bitcoin transaction signing not implemented yet.
errors.chainSendSoon: Error when sending on a not-yet-supported network. {{chain}} is the network name.
errors.invalidEvmRecipient: Form error: recipient is not a valid 0x address. Keep '0x' and 'hex'.
errors.sendFailed: Generic fallback error when sending fails.
errors.invalidAmount: Form error: the amount is not a valid number.
errors.tooManyDecimals: Form error: more decimals than the asset supports. {{max}} is a number.
errors.amountNotPositive: Form error: amount is zero or negative.
errors.api.txParamsFailed: Error with a backend-provided detail message. {{detail}} is appended text.
errors.api.txParamsUnavailable: Error when the local backend is down. {{url}} is the API base URL.
errors.api.broadcastFailed: Error with a backend-provided detail message. {{detail}} is appended text.
errors.api.broadcastUnavailable: Error when the local backend is down. {{url}} is the API base URL.
mock.history.tx1: Demo history row (visible when the backend is offline). Addresses/tickers stay as-is.
mock.history.tx2: Demo history row: a swap via Jupiter (brand name).
mock.history.tx3: Demo history row: a limited token approval for Uniswap (brand name).
mock.history.tx5: Demo history row: a dApp interaction with Aerodrome (brand name).
mock.history.tx6: Demo history row: an NFT mint that failed.
mock.risk.connect: Demo risk reason bullet for a connection request.
mock.risk.personalSign1: Demo risk reason bullet for message signing.
mock.risk.personalSign2: Demo risk reason bullet: untrusted domain.
mock.risk.approveUnlimited1: Demo risk reason bullet: unlimited approve (jargon stays).
mock.risk.approveUnlimited2: Demo risk reason bullet: young unverified contract.
mock.risk.approveUnlimited3: Demo risk reason bullet: phishing-like domain.
mock.risk.unknownCall1: Demo risk reason bullet: undecoded contract call.
mock.risk.unknownCall2: Demo risk reason bullet: simulated balance decrease.
mock.risk.simpleTransfer: Demo risk reason bullet: harmless native transfer.
mock.explain.connect: Demo AI explanation for a connection request. {{origin}} is a site origin.
mock.explain.personalSign: Demo AI explanation for message signing. {{origin}} is a site origin.
mock.explain.approveHigh: Demo AI explanation for a dangerous unlimited approve. {{origin}} is a site origin.
mock.explain.contractMedium: Demo AI explanation for an undecoded contract call. {{origin}} is a site origin.
mock.explain.transferLow: Demo AI explanation for a simple transfer.
mock.explain.chainId: Demo AI explanation for a chain-id request.
mock.chatAnswer: Long demo chat answer shown when the backend is offline. Keep the trailing '_( … )_' marker sentence.
errors.walletLimit: Shown instead of the 'Add wallet' button (Home switcher, Settings, restore flow) and as a background error when the vault limit is reached. {{max}} is a number (currently 5), keep the placeholder verbatim.
approve.noRequestTitle: Empty-state title on the sign screen when opened with no pending dApp request.
approve.noRequestHint: Empty-state hint explaining when this screen normally appears. Keep to 1-2 short sentences.
approve.close: Button that closes the sign popup window.
send.available: Label before the available balance of the selected asset on the Send amount field, e.g. "Available: 6.55 ETH". Keep short.
send.max: Small button that fills the amount field with the full available balance. One short word.
